endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Deployment.Admin/locations/global/productPackages
endpoints.description: Returns an array of product packages.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Deployment.Admin/locations/global/productPackages/{productId}
endpoints.description: Retrieves the specific product package details.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{PRODUCTID}} with a real productid.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Deployment.Admin/locations/global/productPackages/{productId}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{PRODUCTID}} with a real productid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Deployment.Admin/locations/global/productPackages/{productId}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{PRODUCTID}} with a real productid.
